{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Sandviper Remnant
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Sandviper Remnant]] corpse was found on the stairs behind [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Sandviper Remnant]]'s stinger can be used as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
